summary: SPK RC 36 sua parse timestamp SQLite theo UTC de worker heartbeat SPK khong bi danh stale sai mui gio.
changes: API gio chuan hoa timestamp dang 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' cua SQLite thanh UTC truoc khi tinh stale worker heartbeat, tranh lech 7 tieng tren SPK.
Bo sung test cho normalizeDbTimestamp de khoa loi worker online nhung UI van bao stale do parse gio local sai.
Ban nay giu nguyen fix heartbeat SQLite cua RC35 va sua them lop doc runtime status de popup transcode hien worker active dung cach.
